AssignCategory.description: This operation assigns an Outlook category to an email.

AssignCategoryBulk.displayName: Assign a category to multiple emails
AssignCategoryBulk.description: This operation assigns an Outlook category to multiple emails.

CalendarDeleteItem_V2.description: This operation deletes an event in a calendar.

CalendarGetOnNewItemsV3.displayName: When a new event is created (V3)
CalendarGetOnNewItemsV3.description: This operation triggers a flow when a new event is created in a calendar. (V3)

CalendarGetOnUpdatedItemsV3.description: This operation triggers a flow when an event is modified in a calendar. (V3)

ContactDeleteItem_V2.description: This operation deletes a contact from a contacts folder.

ContactGetItem_V2.description: This operation gets a specific contact from a contacts folder.

ContactGetItems_V2.description: This operation gets contacts from a contacts folder.

ContactGetTablesV2.description: This operation lists available contacts folders using Graph API

ContactPatchItem_V2.description: This operation updates a contact in a contacts folder.

ContactPostItem_V2.description: This operation creates a new contact in a contacts folder.

DeleteEmail_V2.description: This operation deletes an email by id.

DraftEmail.description: This operation drafts an email message.

ExportEmail_V2.description: Export the content of the email in the EML file format.

FindMeetingTimes_V2.description: Find meeting time suggestions based on organizer, attendee availability, and time or location constraints

Flag_V2.description: This operation updates an email flag.

GetAttachment_V2.description: This operation gets an email attachment by id.

GetEmailsV3.description: This operation gets emails from a folder via graph apis. Please note that filtering related to these fields: To, Cc, To Or Cc, From, Importance, Fetch Only With Attachments, Subject Filter, is performed using first 250 items in a given mail folder. To avoid that limitation you can use 'Search Query' field.

GetEmailV2.description: This operation gets an email by id.

GetEventsCalendarViewV3.description: This operation gets all events (including instances of recurrences) in a calendar using Graph API. Recurrence property is null in this case.

GetMailTips_V2.displayName: Get mail tips for a mailbox (V2)
GetMailTips_V2.description: Get mail tips for a mailbox such as automatic replies / OOF message or if the mailbox is full. This is not available in GccHigh and Mooncake.

GetOutlookCategoryNames.description: This operation gets Outlook category display names.

GetRoomLists_V2.description: Get all the room lists defined in the user's tenant

GetRooms_V2.description: Get all the meeting rooms defined in the user's tenant

GetRoomsInRoomList_V2.description: Get the meeting rooms in a specific room list

HttpRequest.description: Construct a Microsoft Graph REST API request to invoke. These segments are supported: 1st segement: /me, /users/<userId> 2nd segment: messages, mailFolders, events, calendar, calendars, outlook, inferenceClassification. Learn more: https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/use-the-api.

MarkAsRead_V3.description: This operation marks an email as read/unread.

mcp_EmailsManagement.description: This MCP server manages email messages from your Office 365 account

mcp_MeetingManagement.description: This MCP server manages events, calendars and meetings

MoveV2.description: This operation moves an email to the specified folder within the same mailbox.

OnUpcomingEventsV3.displayName: When an upcoming event is starting soon (V3)
OnUpcomingEventsV3.description: This operation triggers a flow when an upcoming calendar event is starting.

ReplyToV3.description: This operation replies to an email.

SendDraftEmail.description: This operation sends a Draft message.

SendEmailV2.description: This operation sends an email message.

SetAutomaticRepliesSetting_V2.description: Set the automatic replies setting for your mailbox.

SharedMailboxOnNewEmailV2.displayName: When a new email arrives in a shared mailbox (V2)
SharedMailboxOnNewEmailV2.description: This operation triggers a flow when a new email arrives in a shared mailbox. Your account should have permission to access the mailbox for this operation to succeed. It will skip any email that has a total message size greater than the limit put by your Exchange Admin or 50 MB, whichever is less. It may also skip protected emails and emails with invalid body or attachments.

SharedMailboxSendEmailV2.displayName: Send an email from a shared mailbox (V2)
SharedMailboxSendEmailV2.description: This operation sends an email from a shared mailbox. Your account should have permission to access the mailbox for this operation to succeed.

UpdateDraftEmail.description: This operation updates an an email Draft message.

UpdateMyContactPhoto.description: Updates the photo of the specified contact of the current user. The size of the photo must be less than 4 MB.

V3CalendarGetItem.description: This operation gets a specific event from a calendar using Graph API. (V3)

V4CalendarGetItems.description: This operation gets events from a calendar using Graph API. (V4)

V4CalendarPatchItem.description: This operation updates an event in a calendar using Graph API.

V4CalendarPostItem.description: This operation creates a new event in a calendar.

CalendarGetOnChangedItemsV3.displayName: When an event is added, updated or deleted (V3)
CalendarGetOnChangedItemsV3.description: This operation triggers a flow when an event is added, updated or deleted in a calendar. (V3) This is not available in Mooncake.

OnFlaggedEmailV3.description: This operation triggers a flow when an email is flagged.

OnFlaggedEmailV4.description: This operation triggers a flow when an email is flagged.

OnNewEmailV3.description: This operation triggers a flow when a new email arrives. It will skip any email that has a total message size greater than the limit put by your Exchange Admin or 50 MB, whichever is less. It may also skip protected emails and emails with invalid body or attachments.

OnNewMentionMeEmailV3.displayName: When a new email mentioning me arrives (V3)
OnNewMentionMeEmailV3.description: This operation triggers a flow when a new email mentioning me arrives. It will skip any email that has a total message size greater than the limit put by your Exchange Admin or 50 MB, whichever is less. It may also skip protected emails and emails with invalid body or attachments.

SendApprovalMail.description: This operation sends an approval email and waits for a response from the recipient. Please refer to the following link regarding the support of actionable messages in different mail clients: https://docs.microsoft.com/outlook/actionable-messages/#outlook-version-requirements-for-actionable-messages.

SendMailWithOptions.description: This operation sends an email with multiple options and waits for the recipient to respond back with one of the options. Please refer to the following link regarding the support of actionable messages in different mail clients: https://docs.microsoft.com/outlook/actionable-messages/#outlook-version-requirements-for-actionable-messages.
